page_metadata.bioconda__summary: a tool for showing linkage disequilibrium heatmaps from variant call format (VCF) files
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A tool for showing linkage disequilibrium heatmaps from variant call format (VCF) files
page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A fast and convenient tool for visualizing linkage disequilibrium and haplotype blocks based on variant call format files.

LDBlockShow is a fast and effective tool to generate linkage disequilibrium (LD) heatmap from VCF files. It is more time and memory saving than other current tools. LDBlockShow can generate the plots of LD heatmap and interested statistics or annotation results simultaneously. In addition, it also supports subgroup analysis.
